full_text:
Li Chao (Weinan) 李朝 (偉南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Chao (李朝), styledWeinan (偉南), was born in Qi county, Guanghan commandery. Rose through the ranks but died in the defeat at Yiling. Li Chao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Li Chao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
